title: There are always times when you have lost a connection and are trying to reconnect
author: longletian

iterations.description: Issue title is too vague to determine root cause — no steps to reproduce, no protocol specified (RDP/SSH/VNC), and no error details provided about what fails during reconnect.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Issue title is too vague to determine root cause — no steps to reproduce, no protocol specified (RDP/SSH/VNC), and no error details provided about what fails during reconnect.
Approach: Request reproduction steps, protocol type, and error/log output; then investigate reconnect logic in AbstractProtocol and ConnectionInitiator for the specific protocol
